creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 164161
mark as BROKEN

I guess the following log explains everything:
http://beefy1.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93i386-default/403578/logs/lighttpd-mod_geoip-1.4.38.log

The same happens with 93amd64, 101i386 and 101amd64 builds. It also applies to lighttpd-mod_h264_streaming, which must be manually built because of its license. It seems that it's not FreeBSD's bug, but rather the change in Lighttpd 1.4.38 caused those failures. That's why I propose to mark them as BROKEN.
